LanguageData.FCP_Faction_BoS.description: The 钢铁兄弟会 is one of the 老旧est still existing factions in the wasteland. It was founded just before and during the great war itself. True to its army origin, the Brotherhood is a militarised society, based on discipline, prowess, and reliability. However, there are a great number of Brotherhood chapters with often strongly deviating philosophies. Some might see themselves as the sole protectors of humanity and act noble and chivalrous, while others might see outsiders as clueless degenerates unfit for the technological marvels they might possess. Among the few things shared by all chapters of the Brotherhood is their obsession with technology (and the safeguarding of it) and their imposing suits of power armour which make them, despite their s商场 numbers, one of the most powerful groups in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Faction_BoS.ideoDescription: 在麦克森长老的领导下，兄弟会将纪律与目标统一起来。我们保护技术，我们保护人类免受自身侵害，我们消灭威胁我们未来的可憎事物。钢铁与我们同在。
LanguageData.FCP_Faction_BoS.label: 钢铁兄弟会
